Plaintiff Sanae Matsuda'S Motion To Approve Paga Settlement (Specially Set At 9:00 Am Before Judge Kahn)
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court rules as follows:

Plaintiff Sanae Matsuda'S Motion To Approve Paga Settlement. (Specially Set At 9:00 Am Before Judge Kahn)

Granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: HArold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Continued To Mar-18-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Justin Lo, Esq. of Justin Lo Law, T:310.248.2944, for plaintiff/moving party;
Christina Q. Nguyen, Esq. of BREALL & BREALL, T:415.345.0545, for defendant.

Prior to the hearing, Judge Kahn stated that he believes that his colleague, Judge Susan Breall, is related to representatives of defendant's counsel, Breall & Breall. This does not affect his ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No questions were asked or objections raised.

RULING: Hearing held. The Court questions plaintiff's counsel re: evidentiary support as to plaintiff's share in the settlement and counsel's request for attorney's fees, and how the maximum PAGA recovery was reached. After hearing, the court orders that:

PLAINTIFF SANAE MATSUDA's Motion To Approve Paga Settlement is continued to February 3, 2020 at 9:00am. Plaintiff's counsel shall submit a declaration that is limited to attorney's fees by January 28, 2020.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
